title: Google’s Gemini Omni Shows How AI Can Create Anything From Any Input
blurb: At Google I/O 2026, the headline was not just faster AI; it was more capable, more multimodal, and more embedded in everyday workflows.

title: Nearly 1 in 5 Teens Use AI Chatbots for Mental Health Support, Study Shows
blurb: Teens are quietly turning to chatbots for mental health help—and not telling anyone about it.

title: AI Demand Makes Energy One of America's Hottest Business Sectors
blurb: Electricity is now a strategic asset — and the race to control it is reshaping American industry.
